## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and gather insights for AI-focused web development content](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to outcome-based content structure, organizing topics by web development stages](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Incorporate basic AI concepts and client pain points into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Transition to word count-based content production instead of article quantity](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=3497.0)
  - [Gather more technical insights from Webstacks team to enhance content depth](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Restructuring

  - [Proposed new framework organizing content by web development stages (discovery, design, content creation, SEO, implementation, launch, governance)](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Aim to create an "ultimate guide" style resource similar to Moz or C3.ai](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Balance between standalone articles and interconnected, comprehensive guide](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Need to confirm high-level chapters (H1s) and subchapters (H2s) with Webstacks team](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)

### Client Pain Points and AI Integration

  - [Clients often lack understanding of basic AI concepts in web context](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [High interest in content production, predictive analytics, and marketing automation](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
  - [Need to address how AI solves specific problems in web development process](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
  - [Importance of explaining technical concepts (e.g., structured data) in relation to business outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

### Content Production Strategy

  - [Shift from article quantity to word count-based production](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=3497.0)
  - [Currently have 9 approved topics for AI web dev cluster, with 9 more in generation](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=3274.0)
  - [\~2 weeks of content mapped out; need to approve more topics soon](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=3295.0)
  - [Plan to divide content creation between GrowthX and Webstacks based on expertise and word count targets](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=3528.0)

### Technical Insights and SME Input

  - [Jesse to arrange calls with Webstacks team members for deeper technical insights](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Bruna to provide common client questions to inform subchapter structure](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Team to review and comment on new content framework document](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=3407.0)
  - [Emphasis on incorporating Webstacks' philosophy and approach into content](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and approve high-level chapters in new content framework document](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=3337.0)
  - [Bruna and Jesse to compile list of common client questions](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Jesse to arrange calls with Webstacks team members for technical insights](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Team to refine subchapter structure based on client questions and technical input](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=3353.0)
  - [Confirm content strategy and begin identifying specific articles for production](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=3387.0)
  - [Share access to Nikon's call recording and related documents](https://fathom.video/share/Wf83zRyoULUXztGBHxFwyAXXT5W4LQFm?tab=summary&timestamp=3634.0)
